arts.ttl: Bayern Munich discussed bringing Dante back to the club in January
arts.sum: TZ München reports that back in January, Bayern Munich discussed the possibility of bringing centre-back Dante back to the club. At the beginning of the year, Bayern were in need of…

arts.ttl: What can Real Sociedad expect from OGC Nice?
arts.sum: This season’s version of OGC Nice bears hardly any resemblance to the side that Francesco Farioli led into the UEFA Europa League last season. Under Franck Haise, Le Gym are…

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad predicted XI v OGC Nice: Nayef Aguerd to start on return to France
arts.sum: Former Stade Rennais centre-back Nayef Aguerd is set to return to France this evening when Real Sociedad take on OGC Nice in the UEFA Europa League. The Morocco international is…

arts.ttl: Nice predicted XI v Real Sociedad: Mohamed-Ali Cho a doubt, Hicham Boudaoui could return
arts.sum: Franck Haise’s options are heavily limited. Already without Jérémie Boga, Gaëtan Laborde and Terem Moffi up front, Mohamed-Ali Cho is now also a doubt to face Real Sociedad in Le Gym’s UEFA…

arts.ttl: OGC Nice’s Mohamed-Ali Cho uncertain to face former side Real Sociedad
arts.sum: OGC Nice’s Mohamed-Ali Cho (20) is a doubt to face his former club, Real Sociedad, in the UEFA Europa League on Wednesday, Franck Haise has confirmed. Le Gym are short of…

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag fearful of Twente reunion: 'It's not nice to hurt something you love'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has admitted he's not looking forward to facing FC Twente in the UEFA Europa League and would've instead preferred to play'someone else'. "Twente is the team I follow the most," he told reporters ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag: Not nice to hurt former club Twente
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag said he would have preferred not to play against his former club, FC Twente, in the Europa League because it's "not nice to have to hurt something you love."

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad star sits out training ahead of Nice clash
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga outfit Real Sociedad was forced to sit out group training on Monday. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who point towards Umar…
